---
title: "Project 1"
format: 
  dashboard:
    theme: flatly
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>.navbar { display: none; }</style>
---

```{r}
#| include: false
library(plotly)

data <- data.frame(
  category = c("A", "B", "C", "D"),
  value = c(23, 45, 12, 67)
)

data2 <- data.frame(
  month = c("Jan", "Feb", "Mar", "Apr", "May"),
  value = c(10, 25, 18, 40, 32)
)
```

```{r}
#| output: asis
cat('<a href="../index.html" class="back-link">← Back</a>')
```

## Chart

```{r}
plot_ly(data, x = ~category, y = ~value, type = "bar",
        marker = list(color = "#00BCD4")) |>
  layout(
    xaxis = list(title = "Category"),
    yaxis = list(title = "Value"),
    plot_bgcolor = "white",
    paper_bgcolor = "white"
  )
```

## Chart 2

```{r}
plot_ly(data2, x = ~month, y = ~value, type = "scatter", mode = "lines+markers",
        line = list(color = "#D81B60"),
        marker = list(color = "#D81B60")) |>
  layout(
    xaxis = list(title = "Month"),
    yaxis = list(title = "Value"),
    plot_bgcolor = "white",
    paper_bgcolor = "white"
  )
```
